name: canvas
summary: Owns the React Flow rendering surface, persistence sync, drag-drop drop target, zone drawing, and the NodeCard custom node. useCanvasSync handles load/auto-save; Canvas.tsx owns RF state and bridges it to Zustand.
exposes: useCanvasSync(canvasId) → { initialRFNodes, initialRFEdges, loading, syncError, forceManualSave }
Canvas({ onZoomChange, initialNodes, initialEdges, isDrawingZone, onZoneModeEnd })
key_notes: Canvas reads initialNodes/initialEdges ONCE at mount via useNodesState(initialNodes) — prop changes after mount are ignored. Use key={boardId} on Canvas to force remount when board changes.
RF changes (drag, connect, delete) → handleNodesChange/handleEdgesChange → update both RF state AND Zustand.
Auto-save: Zustand subscription debounced 1500ms → PUT /canvas/{canvasId} (full replace).
On 404, createCanvas() posts a blank canvas — supports new boards automatically.
Zones (regions) are in-memory only — not persisted to backend yet.
window.__canvasAddNode(type, clientX, clientY) registered in Canvas.tsx useEffect — BoardPage calls it from DndContext onDragEnd.
ZoneLayer uses viewport math: screenX = flowX * zoom + vpX. Must live inside <ReactFlow>.
DrawZoneOverlay captures pointer events when isDrawingZone=true; panOnDrag=false set on ReactFlow during this mode.
Edge field mapping: backend from/to ↔ store sourceNodeId/targetNodeId — transformed in apiEdgeToStore/storeConnectorToApi.
Embedded canvas: canvasId can be composite '{boardId}:{nodeId}' — useCanvasSync handles creation.
